## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/validate_framework.py` passes (schemas, examples, lens
      structure) — the `validate` check must be green
- [ ] New/edited lenses keep the canonical section order and the verbatim
      0–10 scoring rubric
- [ ] No change weakens "no evidence, no finding," the anti-averaging rule,
      or the observation/finding separation
- [ ] the origin project-specific material stays out of the generic core
